task.diff:
Webhooks POST JSON. Header X-Signature: hmac-sha256(secret, body).
Events: payment.succeeded, payment.failed, refund.created. Payload {id,type,created,data:{...}}
Retries: up to 5x backoff on non-2xx; each has unique X-Delivery-Id (idempotency key).
Local: `mytool webhook listen` forwards to localhost.
